title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
summary: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
summary: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
summary: Digg returns (again) as another place to read AI news.

title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
summary: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
summary: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainable digital subscription business as print revenue continues to decline.

title: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK
summary: Users who sign up for the plan won’t see ads on TikTok, and their data won’t be used for advertising purposes.

title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
summary: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.

title: Discord launches Nitro Rewards, giving subscribers access to the base tier of Xbox Game Pass for no extra cost
summary: Discord's Nitro Rewards program will give Nitro subscribers access to Xbox Game Pass and discounts from Logitech, SteelSeries, and other gaming brands.

title: Venmo’s biggest makeover in years comes at a very interesting time
summary: The timing is notable. PayPal, which owns Venmo, is restructuring to spin Venmo off as a stand-alone business unit — a move widely seen as laying the groundwork for a potential sale. Stripe has reportedly expressed interest in buying PayPal outright.

title: Korea’s biggest manufacturers back Config, the TSMC of robot data
summary: Instead of building robots themselves, the team is focused on a simpler goal — providing data that robots need to learn and operate. They believe that better data will be key to making robots more useful.

title: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more

summary: Lipa says her picture contributed to Samsung's "enormous revenue."

title: A million baby monitors and security cameras were easily viewable by hackers
